bead.title: Add a static heimq microsite and Pages workflow
bead.description: Add the microsite specified in docs/release/release-infrastructure-plan.md. Current state: no site/, website/, mkdocs.yml, package.json, Docusaurus, Astro, or Pages workflow exists. First pass must use checked-in static HTML/CSS under site/ with no Node or package-manager dependency. In-scope files: site/**, .github/workflows/pages.yml or equivalent, README.md links if needed. Required pages or sections: overview, quickstart, deployment, compatibility/testing, architecture. Out of scope: adding Node, MkDocs, Docusaurus, Astro, backend services, or changing product behavior.
bead.acceptance:
1. `test -f site/index.html` passes.
2. `grep -R "Quick start" site` and `grep -R "Deployment" site` pass.
3. A GitHub Pages workflow publishes `site/` on pushes to `main`.
4. Site install commands agree with README.md for source, Docker, and Helm usage.
5. `test ! -f package.json` passes.
6. `cargo fmt --all -- --check` passes.
